Notice Of Motion In Support Of Defts' Motion To Compel Independent Mental Examination For Pltf; Appendix Of Non-California
Off Calendar Mar-21-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kamili Dawson for defendant and moving party State Compensation Insurance Fund
Pamela Pitt for plaintiff and opposing party Mary Ann Burgos

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant State Compensation Insurance Fund's motion to compel an independent mental examination is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to submit to both a clinical interview and testing. The duration of the interview and testing sessions are not to exceed 6 hours respectively. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to selecting a mutually convenient time for the examination. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2005 Set For Trial On May-30-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On May-12-06 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 503
